name: Hank's Haute Dogs
tagline: Gourmet hot dogs in Kakaako — the lobster dog and Chicago dog are a step above any street cart.
mustOrder: Lobster dog — chunks of lobster on a buttery roll with lemon aioli
Chicago dog — proper Vienna beef, neon relish, sport peppers, the whole deal
Bacon-wrapped dog — crispy bacon-wrapped hot dog with jalapeños
parking: Street metered parking on Coral St. SALT at Our Kakaako garage nearby.
talkStory: Hank's started as one of Honolulu's first real gourmet food concepts that proved you could do elevated street food in Hawaii. Chef Hank Adaniya is a classically trained chef from Chicago who brought legit hot dog culture to Kakaako. The lobster dog sounds bougie but it's actually a great deal for what you get. Quick lunch spot if you're exploring the Kakaako murals or SALT area. No frills, just really good dogs.
